LanguageData.CheatBed_Single.label: cheat bed
LanguageData.CheatBed_Single.description: A heavily modified sleep platform engineered for absolute biological optimization. Provides extreme comfort, near-instant rest recovery, massively increased immunity gain and significantly improved surgery success chance. Ideal for eliminating downtime and turning colonists into unstoppable productivity machines. Not intended for balanced gameplay.
LanguageData.CheatBed_Double.label: double cheat bed
LanguageData.CheatBed_Double.description: A dual-occupancy version of the overpowered biological recovery platform. Delivers extreme comfort, rapid rest recovery, enhanced immunity gain and boosted surgery success for both occupants. Perfect for power couples who refuse to sleep inefficiently.
